svg.title: Synalux POS — menu scheduling
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for menu scheduling. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.title: Synalux POS — menu scheduling
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for menu scheduling. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Time-based menu activation – Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner / Late Night / Happy Hour
Menu: Breakfast – Adds: Eggs Benedict, Pancakes...
Menu: Lunch Specials – Adds: Soup, Sandwiches
Overlay ON TOP of Dinner – adds HH pricing
Reduced menu – bar snacks + drinks only
Replace = full menu swap – Overlay = adds/hides items on top of active menu
No special pricing – use regular item prices
Register auto-switches active menu at scheduled time – cashier sees banner
Online menu updates live – items outside schedule hidden from customers
KDS shows schedule name on ticket header – kitchen knows which menu period
Synalux POS Admin Portal – Menu Scheduling – pos_menu_schedules
Auto-switch at time – category show/hide – no rebuilds needed
